name: Control word
notes: Bits: 0=switch on; 1=enable voltage; 2=quick stop(0=active); 3=enable op; 7=fault reset rising edge; 8=halt

name: Status word
notes: Bits: 0=ready; 1=switched on; 2=op enabled; 3=fault; 4=voltage enabled; 5=quick stop(0=active); 6=switch on disabled; 7=warning; 9=remote; 10=target reached; 11=internal limit; 15=home found

name: Command polarity
notes: Bit5=torque polarity; Bit6=speed polarity; Bit7=position polarity; 1=negate

name: Speed offset / feedforward
notes: CSP feedforward when P05.19=2; CSV speed offset

name: Actual position calculation method
notes: 0=absolute (pos feedback reset to 607Ch on origin); 1=relative (pos feedback increments from 607Ch)

name: DI state
notes: Bit0=reverse overtravel; Bit1=forward overtravel; Bit2=origin switch; Bit16=Z signal; Bit17=probe1; Bit18=probe2; Bit20=DI0; Bit21=DI1; Bit22=DI2; Bit23=DI3; Bit24=DI4

name: Target speed
notes: PRIMARY command in CSV mode; IGNORED in CSP mode
